title: Moroccan Seffa with Oysters
description: A fusion of Moroccan and seafood flavors, this dish combines the popular seffa with succulent oysters in a rich and exotic sauce.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the grated ginger and minced garlic and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Add the Moroccan spices and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the oysters and cook until slightly browned on the bottom, about 2-3 minutes.
Add the lemon juice and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the oysters are cooked through.
Fluff the couscous with a fork and add to the saucepan.
Toss the couscous with the oyster mixture and season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve immediately, garnished with chopped fresh parsley if desired.
Cook the couscous according to package instructions before preparing the oyster mixture.
Cook the oysters to an internal temperature of at least 145°F to ensure food safety.
